calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Jonathan Weaver, Esq. for Plaintiff: Evan Swinford, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Emily Ann Bell.
Matter and Proposed Judgment submitted, and is taken under submission by Comm. Kaplan.

Nov. 21, 2006
Judgment granted as follows: Damages $253,996.34 and Costs $425.00, for a total of $254,421.34
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan
